[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111111111 a
1 111111111 a
2 111111111 a
3 010010110 4
4 010001001 3
5 111101011 7
6 111111111 a
7 101111111 8
